title: Writing an email of complaint
explanation:
Writing an email of complaint

A good complaint email is polite, clear and specific.

  • State what happened.
  • Explain the problem.
  • Say what you would like the company to do.
  • Use polite but firm language.

questions.text: [*I am writing to complain about a laptop I bought from your website.|I write complain your laptop website.|Complain laptop from website.]
[*When I switched it on, the screen went black after two minutes.|When switched on screen black two minutes.|It black after two minute.]
[*I would like a full refund or a replacement.|I want refund now immediately.|Give replacement refund.]
[*I have attached a copy of the receipt for reference.|Attached receipt reference copy I have.|Receipt copy attach.]

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: A complaint email should remain ____.  | *polite | angry | vague
You should explain the problem as clearly as ____.  | *possible | angry | formal
It helps to include proof, such as a ____.  | *receipt | headline | lecture
At the end, ask the company to take ____.  | *action | holiday | travel
[*I look forward to hearing from you soon.|I wait hear you soon.|Hear from you I look.]
[*Unfortunately, the product stopped working after one day.|Unfortunate product stop one day.|Stopped after day product.]
[*Could you please let me know how you intend to resolve this matter?|Please tell me now resolve matter.|Resolve matter how now?]
[*I hope this issue can be resolved quickly.|Hope issue resolved quickly.|This issue quickly resolved hope.]
